info.title: Klaviyo API
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
Get a segment with the given segment ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m`

Rate limits when using the `additional-fields[segment]=profile_count` parameter in your API request:
Burst: `1/s`
Steady: `15/m`

To learn more about how the `additional-fields` parameter impacts rate limits, check out our [Rate limits, status codes, and errors](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/docs/rate_limits_and_error_handling) guide. **Scopes:** `segments:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_segment.json)

parameters.name: additional-fields[segment]
parameters.description: Request additional fields not included by default in the response. Supported values: 'profile_count'

filter.description: Optional filter on a specific list of API keys (using last 4 digits of the key)

trigger_type.description: Corresponds to the object which triggered the flow.

filter.description: Optional filter on a specific list of form ids
Optional filter on a specific list of form IDs

operator.description: Operators for list contains set filters.

filter.description: Optional filter on a specific list of user email addresses who initiated the manual action
Optional filter on a specific list of user email addresses who initiated the manual action
Optional filter on a specific subscribe page url

channel.description: Possible channels for profile permissions criterion.

unit.description: Units for profile postal code distance conditions.

dimension.description: Possible dimension for channel affinity criterion.

predicted_channel.description: Possible channels in a channel affinity definition.

dimension.description: Possible dimension for channel affinity criterion.

predicted_channel.description: Possible channels in a channel affinity definition.

value.description: Possible rank values in a channel affinity definition.

dimension.description: Dimension for date profile predictive analytics conditions.
Dimensions for numeric profile predictive analytics conditions.
Dimension for string profile predictive analytics conditions.

value.description: Values for profile predictive analytics gender conditions.

operator.description:
Operators for relative date filters.

e.g. "anniversary in the last 10 days"

Operators for relative date filters.

e.g. "in the last 10 days"

Operators for relative date range filters.

e.g. "between 10 and 20 days ago"

name.description: A helpful name to label the segment

created.description: Date and time when the segment was created, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm)

updated.description: Date and time when the segment was last updated, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm)

is_active.description: Whether the segment is active. Inactive segments are not processed and their membership does not update.

completion_window_seconds.description:
Allowed completion window durations for funnel conditions (in
    seconds).

operator.description:
Operators for static date filters.

E.g. "before 2023-01-01"

Operators for static date range filters.

E.g. "between 2023-01-01 and 2023-02-01"

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#authentication
